tree.name: Jalen Williams
tree.tradeDescription: Drafted 12th overall by OKC using LAC's pick, acquired in Paul George trade (Jul 10, 2019)
tree.note: 2024 All-Star. Pick was one of 5 unprotected 1sts from LAC in the PG mega-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Paul George
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Indiana for Oladipo and Sabonis. Traded to LAC (Jul 10, 2019) for SGA, Gallinari, and 5 1sts including this pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: Victor Oladipo
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Orlando with Sabonis and İlyasova for Serge Ibaka

assetsGivenUp.name: Serge Ibaka
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 24th overall by Seattle using pick acquired from Phoenix (Jul 20, 2007)
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick acquired from PHX in Kurt Thomas trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Emir Preldžić
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 2009 2nd round pick sent to Phoenix for Kurt Thomas, 2008 1st (Ibaka), and 2010 1st (Pondexter)

assetsGivenUp.name: Rashard Lewis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Traded to Orlando for 2009 2nd round pick (Preldžić) and trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: Bobby Jackson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 23rd overall by Seattle with own pick, immediately traded to Denver for James Cotton and 1998 2nd round pick (Rashard Lewis #32)
assetsGivenUp.note: Seattle's own 1997 1st round pick. TRUE ORIGIN of the Ibaka→Oladipo→PG→JWill chain.
